description: This Dart source file defines an ApiClient class for making HTTP requests to JSON APIs, including methods for GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE operations, along with error handling via ApiException; it serves as a wrapper to facilitate network communication in a Flutter application.

classes.name: ApiClient
classes.description: A wrapper class for making HTTP requests to JSON APIs, handling request construction, headers, response parsing, and error handling.

classes.name: ApiException
classes.description: Custom exception class to encapsulate API error responses with status code and message.

methods.name: _uri
methods.description: Constructs a Uri object from a path and optional query parameters.

methods.name: _headers
methods.description: Prepares request headers, including optional authorization token.

methods.name: getJson
methods.description: Performs a GET request to retrieve JSON data, returning a decoded Map.

methods.name: postJson
methods.description: Performs a POST request with optional JSON body, returning a decoded Map.

methods.name: putJson
methods.description: Performs a PUT request with optional JSON body, returning a decoded Map.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the underlying HTTP client connection.
